title: dryopteris urophylla
intro: Dryopteris urophylla, also known as the Chinese wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Dryopteris urophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic benefits.
